pitch.title: Chrono-Heist
pitch.core_theme: The weight of regret and the dangerous temptation of changing the past.
pitch.logline: A team of elite thieves must pull off a bank robbery where the vault exists in three distinct timelines simultaneously while evading a relentless temporal enforcer, but altering the past could erase their very existence.
pitch.synopsis: Act 1: Master thief Elias is recruited for an impossible job: stealing a quantum artifact from a temporal vault. He gathers a crew of timeline-sensitive specialists. Act 2: The heist begins, requiring synchronized actions across 1920, 1995, and 2050. Complications arise when Elias's past self inadvertently interferes, causing temporal echoes that alert the time-police, led by the relentless Agent Vance. Act 3: To secure the artifact, defeat Vance, and save his crew, Elias must sacrifice his own timeline, ensuring his daughter's future while erasing his own existence.

act_1.sequence_number_and_title: Sequence 1: The Weight of the Past

beats.description: Master thief Elias lives in the shadow of a tragic mistake that estranged his daughter, therefore he takes low-level, dangerous jobs just to survive his crushing regret.
A mysterious broker approaches Elias with a mythical proposition: steal a quantum artifact from a temporal vault that can rewrite history. But the vault exists outside of linear time.
Elias realizes this artifact is the only way to undo the tragedy that ruined his daughter's life, therefore he accepts the impossible job, officially stepping out of his retirement.
The vault exists simultaneously in 1920, 1995, and 2050, therefore Elias recruits a crew of timeline-sensitive specialists, including a vintage safecracker, a 90s hacker, and a futuristic tech-merc.

The crew realizes the synchronization requires perfect timing to bypass the temporal locks, but any deviation will trigger a timeline collapse. Therefore, they map out a high-stakes, synchronized infiltration.
The crew powers up their illicit chronal-drives and steps through the breach, therefore crossing the threshold into the time-stream and officially beginning the heist.
The crew splits into the three eras and initiates the heist, therefore the early stages go smoothly as they bypass era-specific security measures using their specialized skills.
A slight delay by the safecracker in 1920 causes a ripple effect that shifts the vault architecture in 2050. But the futuristic tech-merc manages to improvise, keeping the mission alive.
The crew successfully aligns the first layer of the vault doors across all three eras, therefore gaining access to the inner sanctum, but their chronal footprints begin to leak.
Elias navigates the 1995 vault to disable the central alarm, therefore he must move through the exact day his life fell apart.
Elias accidentally encounters his past self executing a different job. But instead of hiding, Elias tries to subtly alter his past self's path, therefore violating the rules of the heist.

This interaction erupts into a massive temporal echo across the timeline. But this anomaly alerts Agent Vance, a ruthless temporal enforcer, therefore Vance locks down the time-stream, trapping the crew.
Vance deploys heavily armed enforcers into all three eras simultaneously, therefore the crew is forced into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse while trying to maintain the vault alignment.
The crew fights back using era-specific weaponry and tactics, but their evasive maneuvers risk further damaging the fragile timeline.
Vance personally breaches the 1995 timeline and captures the 90s hacker, therefore severing the communication link between the eras and jeopardizing the entire operation.
Without the 1995 link, the 1920 and 2050 vaults begin to crush the crew members inside. But Elias manages to rescue the hacker, barely escaping Vance's grasp.

The crew regroups in a temporal pocket, battered and defeated. Elias discovers the artifact is actually the structural anchor holding the temporal vault together, therefore stealing it will collapse the timeline.

Elias realizes the horrifying truth: to steal the artifact and save his daughter's future, someone must stay behind to act as the new anchor. Therefore, he secretly alters the chronal-drives to ensure his crew survives while he prepares to take the fall.
Elias rallies his crew for a desperate final synchronization, therefore they launch a multi-era counter-attack to distract Vance's forces.
The crew successfully bypasses the final locks and opens the central quantum core. But Vance anticipates their move and ambushes Elias directly inside the core.
Elias engages in a brutal hand-to-hand fight with Vance across shifting timelines, therefore buying his crew the exact seconds they need to extract the artifact.
Elias defeats Vance by trapping him in a collapsing 1920 time-loop, but the vault begins to implode violently without the artifact.

Elias uses the artifact's power to rewrite his daughter's tragic past and secure his crew's escape back to their present. But instead of being erased, the temporal collapse violently ejects Elias into an uncharted chronal rift.

Elias awakens in a vibrant, alternate future timeline. Therefore, he smiles, knowing his daughter is safe in her own perfect reality, but his chronal-tracker suddenly blinks with a new, mysterious signal, setting up his next temporal heist.
